# Project Memory Route Map

## Recommended Reading Order

For new contributors, read documents in this order:

1. [Current Project Overview](./current.md)
2. [Invariants](./invariants.md)
3. [Decisions](./decisions.md)
4. [Inbox](./inbox.md)

## Document Routing Table

| ID | Path | Status | Topics | Read When | Last Reviewed |
|:---|:-----|:-------|:-------|:----------|:-------------|
| current-overview | ./current.md | current | overview, modules, structure | onboarding to the project, understanding the overall architecture, changing package boundaries | 2026-06-04 |
| decisions | ./decisions.md | current | decisions, adr | recording a design decision, investigating why something is designed a certain way | 2026-06-04 |
| inbox | ./inbox.md | current | inbox, unsorted | writing unsorted design notes, unable to determine the appropriate document | 2026-06-04 |
| invariants | ./invariants.md | current | invariants, constraints, rules | making design changes, changing module boundaries, modifying build or test infrastructure | 2026-06-04 |
| open-questions | ./open-questions.md | question | questions, open, unresolved | encountering unclear design areas, proposing speculative design | 2026-06-04 |

## Fallback

If no document above matches your need:

- Check [inbox.md](./inbox.md) for unclassified design memos
- Check [open-questions.md](./open-questions.md) for unresolved design questions

## Update Rules

When updating memory documents, follow these rules:

- Do not invent architecture. Document what exists or what was decided.
- If you cannot classify a piece of information, write it to [inbox.md](./inbox.md).
- After adding a new memory document or changing frontmatter, recompile the index by running `./scripts/prompt/deploy.sh --force`.
- If a design decision changed, update or create an ADR in `adr/`.
- If unclear, write to [open-questions.md](./open-questions.md) rather than making assumptions.
